metadata.title: Fantasy
metadata.lyrics:
[00:36.34] Every man has a place
[00:38.86] In his heart, there's a space
[00:41.65] And the world can't erase his fantasies
[00:47.24] Take a ride in the sky
[00:49.80] On our ship, fantasize
[00:52.66] All your dreams will come true right away
[00:58.11] And we will live together
[01:03.47] Until the 12th of never
[01:08.93] Our voices will ring forever, as one
[01:17.97] 
[01:30.38] Every thought is a dream
[01:32.71] Rushing by in a stream
[01:35.64] Bringing life to the kingdom of doing
[01:41.12] Take a ride in the sky
[01:43.61] On our ship, fantasize
[01:46.46] All your dreams will come true miles away
[01:52.16] Our voices will ring together
[01:57.25] Until the 12th of never
[02:02.71] We all will live love forever, as one
[02:09.41] 
[02:13.77] Come to see victory
[02:16.13] In the land called fantasy
[02:19.19] Loving life, a new degree
[02:21.83] Bring your mind to everlasting liberty
[02:26.76] 
[02:44.02] As one
[02:49.57] Come to see victory
[02:51.99] In a land called fantasy
[02:54.70] Loving life for you and me
[02:57.01] To behold, to your soul is ecstasy
[03:01.92] You will find (you will find)
[03:04.32] Other kind (other kind)
[03:05.40] That has been in search of you
[03:08.29] Many lives has brought you to
[03:10.56] Recognize (recognize), it's your life now in review
[03:15.41] 
[03:17.96] And as you stay for the play
[03:22.84] Fantasy has in store for you
[03:25.41] Glowing light will see you through
[03:28.07] It's your day, shining day
[03:30.51] All your dreams come true
[03:32.22] Oh-ah-oh-ah-oh-oh
[03:35.44] As you glide in your stride
[03:38.64] With the wind as you fly away
[03:41.61] Give a smile from your lips and say
[03:44.55] "I am free, yes, I'm free, now I'm on my way"
[03:51.68] Come to see victory
[03:54.83] In a land called fantasy
[03:57.76] Loving life for you and me
[04:00.45] To behold to your soul is ecstasy
[04:05.55] 
[04:07.69] You will find other kind
[04:11.12] That has been in search of you
[04:13.76] Many lives has brought you to
[04:16.37] Recognize, it's your life now in review
[04:23.95]
